loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: Showing today's total energy (kWh) as a proxy for run-hours, and load factor (kW) as a proxy for availability, as the meter does not log dedicated runtime counters or availability scores.

loop1.title: Energy & Reliability
loop1.note: Showing today's active/reactive/apparent energy and power factor; MTBF and MTTR are not measured by this meter and are left blank.
